## Summary

-

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] Live E2E, if this changes API behavior, auth, sync, comments, or release workflows

## Public Safety

- [ ] Every new file is necessary for the public CLI repo
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, private keys, cookies, `.env` files, or copied terminal output
- [ ] No local absolute paths, usernames, private checkout paths, or machine-specific details
- [ ] No private Commentary source paths, unreleased internal implementation details, customer data, or private infrastructure references
- [ ] Examples use public docs, generic domains, or localhost only
